sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports difficulty quitting smoking and reports left hand pain. He also reports vision loss and pain. The patient reports intermittent dizziness for one week, worse when standing.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is mildly low. Heart rate is within normal limits. Neurologic examination is nonfocal.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has neovascular age-related macular degeneration and high blood pressure. Symptoms are most consistent with orthostatic dizziness.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor will perform a physical exam on the patient's eyes. The doctor wants to place a pill bottle on the counter. The doctor plans to administer monthly lucent injections. The doctor orders an injection. The doctor wants the patient to start taking blood pressure medication.
